task_completion.description: Verify that the Weasis application is open and displaying the loaded CT scan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis GUI is visible with a medical image loaded in the main viewer.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least one distance measurement has been drawn on the scan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distance measurement line with a length value is visible on the anatomical image.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly three distinct distance measurements are drawn on different anatomical regions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three separate distance measurement lines are visible on different parts of the scan.

task_completion.description: Verify that one of the measurements is selected for deletion.
task_completion.visual_evidence: One of the three measurements is highlighted, shows control points/handles, or a context menu with a delete option is open next to it.

task_completion.description: Verify that exactly one measurement was deleted, leaving two remaining.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The viewer now shows exactly two distance measurements, confirming one of the initial three was removed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates saving a screenshot of the viewer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As', 'Export', or system screenshot dialog is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the screenshot is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog or terminal command shows the file being saved to `~/DICOM/exports/selective_deletion.png` (or `/home/ga/DICOM/exports/selective_deletion.png`).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Weasis GUI to draw and delete measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor movements, tool selections in the Weasis toolbar, and context menus are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify that the measurements are genuine Weasis annotations.
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement lines and text overlays match the standard Weasis UI style, and were not added using an external paint tool.

integrity.description: Verify that the exported image is a genuine screenshot of the viewer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final saved image corresponds to the actual state of the Weasis viewer with exactly two measurements, rather than a pre-existing or externally modified image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output image path is /home/ga/DICOM/exports/selective_deletion.png. Exactly 3 measurements must be drawn initially, and exactly 2 measurements must remain in the final exported image.
